budgets.budget.costtypes.IncludeCredit.Docs: Specifies whether a budget includes credits.  The default value is `true`.

budgets.budget.costtypes.IncludeDiscount.Docs: Specifies whether a budget includes discounts.  The default value is `true`.

budgets.budget.costtypes.IncludeOtherSub.Docs: Specifies whether a budget includes non-RI subscription costs.  The default value is `true`.

budgets.budget.costtypes.IncludeRecurrin.Docs: Specifies whether a budget includes recurring fees such as monthly RI fees.  The default value is `true`.

budgets.budget.costtypes.IncludeRefund.Docs: Specifies whether a budget includes refunds.  The default value is `true`.

budgets.budget.costtypes.IncludeSubscrip.Docs: Specifies whether a budget includes subscriptions.  The default value is `true`.

budgets.budget.costtypes.IncludeSupport.Docs: Specifies whether a budget includes support subscription fees.  The default value is `true`.

budgets.budget.costtypes.IncludeTax.Docs: Specifies whether a budget includes taxes.  The default value is `true`.

budgets.budget.costtypes.IncludeUpfront.Docs: Specifies whether a budget includes upfront RI costs.  The default value is `true`.

budgets.budget.costtypes.UseAmortized.Docs: Specifies whether a budget uses the amortized rate.  The default value is `false`.

budgets.budget.costtypes.UseBlended.Docs: Specifies whether a budget uses a blended rate.  The default value is `false`.
